top_signals.title: IMF says policy choices will determine whether tokenization strengthens or fragments the financial system
top_signals.summary: The IMF's Tobias Adrian said risks could shift from banks toward market infrastructure providers and smart contracts as tokenization expands.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran begins six-day funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei nearly four months after his death
top_signals.summary: Iran plans a six-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, with ceremonies across Iran and Iraq before burial in Mashhad.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
